summary: Shifted the opening to a distinct front-glass entry point instead of a time-led scaffold, and tightened the final ledger beat so the handoff into chapter 14's registry scene lands more cleanly without changing chapter events.
edits: Recast the opening around Jo marking the front glass while preserving the next-morning, pre-dawn setup.
Adjusted the final sentence to foreground the ledger and pen choice before the next interruption.
